3. Gemini - 8/10 - Geminis are quick-witted and adaptable, making them excellent communicators, but their attention span can be short-lived.

8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Scorpios are intense and passionate, with a strong intuition that drives them to uncover the truth, but their intensity can be overwhelming.

10. Capricorn - 5/10 - Capricorns are responsible and ambitious, but their rigidity and seriousness can make them seem dry and unyielding at times.
11. Aquarius - 8/10 - Aquarians are humanitarian and unconventional, with a natural desire for independence and freedom, but their detachment can make them seem aloof.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Pisces are imaginative and empathetic, with a deep connection to the emotional realm, but their dreaminess can make them appear disorganized and spaced-out.
